creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pkg-fallout/ doesn't have archives for Monday 14 October 2019 or later. The last entry is from "Sat Oct 12 21:52:05 UTC 2019". While one could look at pkg-status for build errors instead the logs sometimes disappear if machines are turned off or repurposed.
